name: @ferax564/noma-cli
description: Noma — readable document format for humans and agents

scripts.render:examples: tsx src/cli.ts render examples/thesis.noma --to html --out dist/thesis.html && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/landing.noma --to html --out dist/landing.html && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/agent-plan.noma --to html --out dist/examples/agent-plan.html && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/agent-plan.noma --to llm --out dist/examples/agent-plan.llm.txt && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/agent-plan.noma --to json --out dist/examples/agent-plan.json && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/tech-doc.noma --to html --out dist/examples/tech-doc.html && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/tech-doc.noma --to llm --out dist/examples/tech-doc.llm.txt && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/tech-doc.noma --to json --out dist/examples/tech-doc.json && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/research-thesis.noma --to html --out dist/examples/research-thesis.html && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/research-thesis.noma --to llm --out dist/examples/research-thesis.llm.txt && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/research-thesis.noma --to json --out dist/examples/research-thesis.json
scripts.render:docs: tsx src/cli.ts render docs/direction.noma --to html --out dist/docs/direction.html && tsx src/cli.ts render docs/spec.noma --to html --out dist/docs/spec.html && tsx src/cli.ts render docs/compatibility.noma --to html --out dist/docs/compatibility.html && tsx src/cli.ts render docs/architecture.noma --to html --out dist/docs/architecture.html && tsx src/cli.ts render docs/getting-started.noma --to html --out dist/docs/getting-started.html && tsx src/cli.ts render docs/agent-protocol.noma --to html --out dist/docs/agent-protocol.html && tsx src/cli.ts render docs/spec-agent-protocol-v1.noma --to html --out dist/docs/spec-agent-protocol-v1.html && tsx src/cli.ts render docs/comparison.noma --to html --out dist/docs/comparison.html && tsx src/cli.ts render docs/case-studies.noma --to html --out dist/docs/case-studies.html && tsx src/cli.ts render docs/agent-guide.noma --to html --out dist/docs/agent-guide.html && tsx src/cli.ts render docs/templates.noma --to html --out dist/docs/templates.html && tsx src/cli.ts render docs/research-markdown-html-pains.noma --to html --out dist/docs/research-markdown-html-pains.html
scripts.render:pdf: tsx src/cli.ts render examples/thesis.noma --to pdf --out dist/thesis.pdf
scripts.build:site: npm run render:examples && npm run render:docs && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/index.noma --to html --out dist/_index-noma.html && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/research-thesis.noma --to html --theme dark --out dist/examples/research-thesis-dark.html && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/book/book.noma.yml --to html --out dist/examples/book.html && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/book/book.noma.yml --to llm --out dist/examples/book.llm.txt && tsx src/cli.ts render examples/book/book.noma.yml --to site --out dist/examples/book-site && npm run demo:stale-memo && npm run demo:agent-memory && cp -r site/. dist/ && npm run render:pdf:demos
scripts.demo: npm run render:examples && npm run render:pdf

author: ferax564
